calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-01-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short
cause trial/Prove Up Hearing. Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Nichole Santiago, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
Witness Kim Reeder, Property Manager, sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Michelle Hood.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibit:
1-Declaration of Ana Villanueva

Court returns exhibits to Plaintiff's Counsel.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff
and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1817 25th Street, San Francisco,
California 94107, County of San Francisco.

Damages $0.00
Holdover damages $499.00
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $295.00
for a Total Judgment of $794.00

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-01-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 3
Judge Pro Tem: Stephen Zollman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Kim Reeder.
Attorney Nichole Maria Santiago for the plaintiff.
Defendant Michelle Hood is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of Feb 01, 2016 remains on calendar. (501/jpt)
